title: Breaking into Impel Down: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: There's a forest... in the prison!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: They're prisoners! This isn't just a forest!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: suffering from being sliced all over...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: This is level 1, the crjinson hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What!? We're going to get cut up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just be quiet and hold on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Throw my feet to the ground!!!
